core.title: Core info
core.description: I am a Snowflake & Data Solutions Architect with 7+ years of experience designing and optimizing data warehouses and data lakes across on-premise, AWS, and Azure ecosystems. I believe that bridging the gap between complex data infrastructure and actionable business insight is essential in the modern enterprise.

item.title: Cloud Data Architecture
item.content: My work spans the full spectrum of cloud data architecture — from designing Snowflake multi-cluster warehouses and cross-region disaster recovery to implementing secure PrivateLink connectivity and zero-trust IAM frameworks.

item.title: Focus
item.content: My focus is delivering high-performance, cost-efficient data platforms aligning with business goals and regulatory requirements. I continuously explore GenAI integrations, emerging Snowflake capabilities, and modern ELT patterns like Data Mesh and Data Vault 2.0.

item.title: Innovation Projects
item.content: From an LLM-powered Streamlit chatbot querying blockchain data in natural language, to a custom 29-feature governance application for real-time Snowflake security monitoring — built in a 2-week sprint.

item.title: Architecture or Engineering?
item.content: Architecture and engineering are two sides of the same coin in the data world. I bridge strategy and execution — turning conceptual data roadmaps into optimized physical systems that actually run.

item.title: Above and Beyond
item.content: My work does not end with the ticket. Mentoring 10+ engineers, conducting R&D on Snowflake Marketplace capabilities, and defining enterprise data strategies are all part of how I deliver value beyond the immediate ask.
